center.name: 亞馬遜省
center.summary: 亞馬遜省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Purplish jacamar、Johannes's tody-tyrant、Slender-footed tyrannulet等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia's departments of Caquetá, Putumayo, and Amazonas; in the eastern half of Ecuador; and in northern Peru south at least to the Río Marañón and perhaps further to the rios Ucayali and Cushabatay. Though some maps show its range extending into far western Brazil, the SACC has no records from that country.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A separate population is found in southern Colombia's Putumayo and Amazonas departments and possibly slightly into northeastern Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The purplish jacamar is found in the western Amazon Basin from southeast Colombia's Putumayo and Amazonas Departments south through eastern Ecuador into eastern Peru and east into Brazil as far as the Juruá River in Amazonas state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-vented tapaculo is found in the central Andes of Peru from southern Amazonas south to Junín

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southeastern Venezuela's Bolívar and Amazonas states, extreme eastern Colombia between Vichada and Amazonas departments, and south through Amazonas state in northwestern Brazil and northeastern Ecuador into northeastern Peru's Department of Loreto

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-fronted plushcrown is found in southeastern Colombia's Putumayo and Amazonas departments, eastern Ecuador and Peru, Beni Department in northeastern Bolivia, and from them into western Brazil east to the lower Juruá and upper Purus rivers
